robots_audit.retrieval_constraint: exact already-known PDF URL only; no host crawl or path discovery

pdf_metadata.page_size_points: variable; pdfinfo reports 461 x 677 points for the current page
pdf_metadata.text_layer_description: hidden OCR text over scanned page images
pdf_metadata.title: Results of some tests of manila rope.

bibliographic_resolution.report_series: Technologic Papers of the Bureau of Standards
bibliographic_resolution.title: Results of Some Tests of Manila Rope
bibliographic_resolution.evidence: The official NIST year catalog supplies series identity, T198, abbreviated authors and DOI; the report cover supplies full names, Bureau positions and issue date; the closing line supplies the report date. Later digitization and hosting dates are file provenance only.

rights.employee_authorship_evidence: The report cover identifies Ambrose H. Stang as Associate Physicist and Lory R. Strickenberg as Assistant Mechanical Engineer, both of the Bureau of Standards.
rights.series_evidence: The official NIST 1921 catalog places the report in Technologic Papers of the Bureau of Standards and resolves T198 to DOI 10.6028/nbst.6078.
rights.domestic_basis: NIST technical-series policy states that employee-authored works are not subject to United States copyright; 17 U.S.C. 105.
rights.foreign_rights_basis: NIST technical-series policy provides a non-exclusive perpetual paid-up royalty-free worldwide grant for reprints and derivative works to the extent NIST asserts foreign rights.
rights.third_party_caveat: The policy warns that NIST publications may contain protected third-party work. Every photograph, visual mark, standard, purchase-specification body, manufacturer-specific remark and uncertain component is excluded.
rights.modification_notice: Manually rewritten, narrowed and safety-bounded on 2026-07-16.
rights.attribution: Republished courtesy of the National Institute of Standards and Technology.

audit.text_review: all 13 pages OCR-screened and manually read against the scan; all catalog and rights-page surfaces manually reviewed
audit.visual_review: all 13 rendered PDF pages manually inspected in two ordered contact sheets; every substantive page checked at page resolution
